item.title: RapSheet: Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 1h Earlier today, #Giants GM Joe Schoen told reporters: “I'll echo what coach said last week. W
item.description:
Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 1h Earlier today, #Giants GM Joe Schoen told reporters: “I'll echo what coach said last week. We'd like for Dexter to be here, and at some point we'll come to a resolution here, whatever that may be. We'll see."
Next week’s Draft is an inflection point. Cita Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 1h The #Giants and star DL Dexter Lawrence, who have been talking about a new big-money extension, have reached an impasse, sources say.
The Giants have engaged with teams on a potential trade and that will continue. It should come to a head before the Draft. 33 63 688 269 mil
